title: ranunculus defectiflorus
intro: Ranunculus defectiflorus, also known as the small-flowered buttercup, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's extracts have been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Ranunculus defectiflorus can be prepared into herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
